zh.lifeSummary: 當David Maulik於大約1521年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 海爾布洛倫布拉肯海姆迪倫其莫時，他的父親Joachimi Maulick22歲，母親Elisabetha Capis23歲。他於1546年與Katarina Eckhart在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 海爾布洛倫布拉肯海姆迪倫其莫結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1598年在他的家鄉享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David Maulik于大约1521年出生在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 海爾布洛倫布拉肯海姆迪倫其莫时，他的父亲Joachimi Maulick22岁，母亲Elisabetha Capis23岁。他于1546年与Katarina Eckhart在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 海爾布洛倫布拉肯海姆迪倫其莫结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1598年在他的家乡享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maulik
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Germanized form of Sorbian and Polish   Pawlik  , and of other Slavic cognates (see   Paulick  ).

variants.name: Pawlik
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jozef, Tadeusz, Casimir, Franciszek, Irena, Kazimierz, Krzysztof, Leszek, Stanislaw, Wieslaw, Zbigniew.  German Klaus-Dieter, Monika, Aloysius, Florian, Gunter, Ignatz, Markus.

Polish and Sorbian: from the personal name Pawlik, a pet form of Polish Paweł, Sorbian Pawoł (see Paul ). This surname is also found among Rusyns (Lemkos) in Poland. Compare Paulick , Paulik , Pavlick , and Pavlik .

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When David Maulik was born about 1521, in Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Heilbronn, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, his father, Joachimi Maulick, was 22 and his mother, Elisabetha Capis, was 23. He married Katarina Eckhart in 1546, in Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Heilbronn, Baden-Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1598, in his hometown, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David Maulik est né environ 1521, à Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Landkreis Heilbronn, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Joachimi Maulick, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elisabetha Capis, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Katarina Eckhart en 1546, à Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Landkreis Heilbronn, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1598, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans.

Er hat 1546 in Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Landkreis Heilbronn, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland Katarina Eckhart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. ko.lifeSummary: David Maulik(이)가 대략 1521년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 헤이브론 브라c켄하임 드u렌지머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Joachimi Maulick(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabetha Capis(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1546년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 헤이브론 브라c켄하임 드u렌지머에서 Katarina Eckhart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1598년 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David Maulik nasceu aproximadamente 1521, em Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Landkreis Heilbronn, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Joachimi Maulick, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elisabetha Capis, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Katarina Eckhart em 1546, em Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Landkreis Heilbronn, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1598, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos.

ru.Dürrenzimmern, Landkreis Heilbronn, Bade: дuррензиммирн, браккеним, ландкрис хилбронн, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Maulik родился около 1521 г. в местности дuррензиммирн, браккеним, ландкрис хилбронн, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени Joachimi Maulick было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabetha Capis, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Katarina Eckhart в 1546 г. в местности дuррензиммирн, браккеним, ландкрис хилбронн, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1598 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David Maulik nació aproximadamente 1521, en Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Landkreis Heilbronn, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Joachimi Maulick, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Elisabetha Capis, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Katarina Eckhart en 1546, en Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Landkreis Heilbronn, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1598, en su pueblo, a la edad de 78 años.
